ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender identity of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country of origin for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for login */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for login */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used for login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the password reset */,
  "token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, logout, create_user) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
